judgment.summary: Strong growth estimates and margins are offset by a high trailing P/E and modest current returns.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 4.1%; next earnings date is 2026-08-03.
positives: Analyst growth estimates are strong for the current quarter (34.8%) and fiscal year (31.5%).
Gross margin (42.7%) and operating margin (18.2%) are robust.
Forward P/E of 25.44 is significantly lower than trailing P/E of 79.53, indicating expected earnings growth.
PEG ratio of 0.36 suggests the stock may be undervalued relative to its earnings growth.
Strong free cash flow of $1.28B supports operations and potential investments.
negatives: Trailing P/E of 79.53 is very high, suggesting current earnings are not justifying the valuation.
Return on equity (7.5%) and return on assets (6.8%) are modest.
Debt/Equity ratio of 44.34 indicates a notable level of leverage.
Mean analyst target of $103.97 is below the current spot price of $108.16.
Beta of 1.94 suggests higher volatility than the broader market.

news.paragraph: ON Semiconductor is mentioned as a favored tech stock among hedge funds last month, according to Hazeltree data. While this suggests positive institutional sentiment, it's a broad trend and not specific company news. The upcoming earnings report on August 3rd will be a key catalyst to watch for company-specific performance.

headlines.title: Tech leaders favoured by hedge funds last month, Hazeltree says

examples.body: $MX is the next 30x chip stock if you missed your chance with $MU $NVDA or $ON
$ON get out while you still can. If you drill into that acquisition rumor you will find it’s nothing more than a rumor. The likelihood of it going through is 0…
$ON out with a 2 dollar profit per share now short
$CPRI $MU $ON $970% already for $MU; congrats 🔆🌿🌟 Checkout $PHR and $RXRX for similar potential for longs. Do your DD and get in. Now undervalued.
